name: Inside Explorer
short_description: This is Inside Explorer consumer version – The software where you can digitally explore the inside of things from the comfort of your home. It is loaded with real-time rendered 3D visualizations based on unique scientific data.
detailed_description:
This is the consumer version of inside Explorer for individual use. If interested in software licenses for organizations and businesses visit our website.

Today it’s your turn to get your hands on that very same 3D X-ray data that scientists, doctors or veterinarians use to investigate the inside of an object or body without leaving a scratch. Inside Explorer comes pre-installed with five fascinating animal datasets beautifully visualized for everyone to explore.

Learning by doing – and exploring
Inside Explorer is not only super easy-to-use, totally unique and based on actual science, it is also very useful for students, kids or curious minds who want to learn by studying the invisible. Dig into natural science by investigating the physics of various animals, understand anatomy and biology by looking inside our bodies or learn about history and culture by unwrapping mummies or historical artifacts. You will be surprised what can be found.

Key Features
  • Use the cut planes to cut into the object.
  • Move and rotate to explore from any desired angle.
  • Zoom in to discover unique features and characteristics
  • Peel of layers to investigate separate features.
  • Press the information spots to learn detailed information about the findings in each dataset as well as general facts.

Who is it for?
Short answer:
For everyone.
Long answer:
  • For sworn science enthusiasts.
  • For curious children who can’t wait to discover new things
  • For the youngest easily fascinated ones.
  • For students who want to do “homework” on STEAM.
  • For you who want to impress your friends with cool facts.
  • To be able to say? “Hey, I now know what a seal looks like without fat”
